Bash(cd /Users/soumya.shrivastava/AgenticallyBuiltChatBot && python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('INTERNALCHATBOT_REQUIREMENTS_v5.xlsx', data_only=True\)
ws = wb['Story Tracker']
headers = [c.value for c in ws[1]]
print\('Headers:', headers\)
print\(\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=2, max_col=len\(headers\), values_only=False\):
    vals = [c.value for c in row]
    if vals[0]:  # has UC ID
        print\(f'Row {row[0].row}: UC={vals[0]} Epic={vals[1]} Story={vals[2]} Title={vals[3][:60] if vals[3] else \\"\\"} JiraStatus={vals[5]} ImplStatus={vals[6]} Tests={vals[7]} Notes={vals[8]}'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(echo "=== Test class summary ===" && grep -rn "^class Test" backend/tests/*.py | sed 's/.*://')

Bash(echo "=== FORM GUIDANCE in agent.py ===" && grep -n "FORM GUIDANCE\\|form.guidance\\|form_guidance" app/agent.py | head -10 && echo "=== session TTL config ===" && grep -n "session_ttl\\|SESSION_TTL\\|session_timeout" app/config.py app/agent.py 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo "=== version governance ===" && grep -rn "version.*govern\\|approved.*version\\|draft.*version\\|superseded" app/ --include="*.py" 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo "=== multi-doc / aggregate ===" && grep -n "multi.doc\\|aggregat\\|multiple.*doc\\|consolidat" app/agent.py 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo "=== SSO ===" && grep -rn "SSO\\|sso\\|saml\\|oauth2.*provider\\|openid" app/ --include="*.py" 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo "=== admin console ===" && grep -rn "admin.*console\\|admin.*dashboard\\|admin.*panel" app/ --include="*.py" 2>/dev/null | head -10)
